HB68II.desc: The HB 68 II is a pure 8-channel DSP with 31-band equalization and a full suite of control features including I/O Matrix, LP and HP Filters, Speaker Assignment, Delay, Levels, and Polarity. It features HD Bluetooth streaming, an integrated Music Player with OTG input, and supports both PC and mobile (smartphone) control via a dedicated app. The optional HB DSP II-R remote allows volume, preset, source, and song-navigation control from the dashboard.
narr: Key Features
8-channel DSP with 31-band EQ per output channel
HD Bluetooth streaming and integrated Music Player (App)
2-Ch RCA inputs, 6-Ch high-level inputs, 8-Ch RCA outputs
I/O Mixing Matrix with Butterworth, Bessel, and Linkwitz crossover types
Crossover slopes 6 – 48 dB/Oct., PC and mobile APP control
Compatible with optional HB DSP II-R remote for volume, preset, and source selection

HB46II4A.desc: The HB 46 II 4A is a 6-channel DSP combined with an integrated 4-channel Class AB amplifier, delivering 4 × 23 W RMS at 4 Ω and 4 × 35 W RMS at 2 Ω (4 × 70 W Max). It features 31-band equalization, HD Bluetooth streaming, an integrated Music Player, OTG input, and full PC and mobile control via a dedicated app. The optional HB DSP II-R remote provides dashboard-level control of volume, presets, source selection, and Music Player navigation.
narr: Key Features
6-channel DSP with integrated 4-Ch Class AB amplifier
31-band EQ per output channel with I/O Mixing Matrix
HD Bluetooth streaming and integrated Music Player (App)
2-Ch RCA inputs, 4-Ch high-level inputs, 6-Ch RCA outputs
PC and mobile APP DSP control; optional remote for dashboard use

HB48II4A.desc: The HB 48 II 4A is an 8-channel DSP combined with an integrated 4-channel Class AB amplifier, delivering 4 × 23 W RMS at 4 Ω and 4 × 35 W RMS at 2 Ω (4 × 70 W Max). It features 31-band equalization, HD Bluetooth streaming, an integrated Music Player, OTG input, and full PC and mobile control via a dedicated app. The optional HB DSP II-R remote provides dashboard-level control of volume, presets, source selection, and Music Player navigation.
narr: Key Features
8-channel DSP with integrated 4-Ch Class AB amplifier
31-band EQ per output channel with I/O Mixing Matrix
HD Bluetooth streaming and integrated Music Player (App)
2-Ch RCA inputs, 4-Ch high-level inputs, 8-Ch RCA outputs
PC and mobile APP DSP control; optional remote for dashboard use

HB410II8A.desc: The HB 410 II 8A is a 10-channel DSP combined with an integrated 8-channel Class AB amplifier, delivering 8 × 23 W RMS at 4 Ω and 8 × 35 W RMS at 2 Ω (8 × 70 W Max). It features 31-band equalization, HD Bluetooth streaming, an integrated Music Player, OTG input, and full PC and mobile control via a dedicated app. The optional HB DSP II-R remote provides dashboard-level control of volume, presets, source selection, and Music Player navigation.
narr: Key Features
10-channel DSP with integrated 8-Ch Class AB amplifier
31-band EQ per output channel with I/O Mixing Matrix
HD Bluetooth streaming and integrated Music Player (App)
2-Ch RCA inputs, 4-Ch high-level inputs, 10-Ch RCA outputs
PC and mobile APP DSP control; optional remote for dashboard use

HB810II8AD.desc: The HB 810 II 8AD is a 10-channel DSP with an integrated 8-channel hybrid amplifier section combining 4-channel Class AB and 4-channel bridgeable Class D stages. The Class AB channels deliver 4 × 35 W (4 Ω) / 4 × 50 W (2 Ω) RMS, while the Class D channels deliver 4 × 100 W (4 Ω) / 4 × 150 W (2 Ω) / 2 × 300 W (4 Ω bridged) RMS. It includes 31-band EQ, HD Bluetooth streaming, integrated Music Player, optical and OTG inputs, and full PC and mobile DSP control.
narr: Key Features
10-channel DSP with 4-Ch Class AB + 4-Ch bridgeable Class D amp
Class AB RMS: 4 × 35 W (4 Ω) / 4 × 50 W (2 Ω)
31-band EQ per output channel with I/O Mixing Matrix
Optical digital input plus Aux, BT, High-Level, USB, OTG sources
HD Bluetooth streaming, integrated Music Player, PC and mobile APP control
sections: Aux, BT, High-Level, USB, OTG, Optical

HB104DII.desc: The HB 104D II is a 4-channel Class D amplifier delivering 4 × 100 W RMS at 4 Ω, 4 × 150 W RMS at 2 Ω, and 2 × 250 W RMS bridged at 4 Ω. It accepts both RCA low-level and high-level inputs and features an LP/Full/HP electronic crossover with adjustable frequency for precise speaker matching. Gain control spans 0.25 V to 6 V for optimal output-level adjustment.
narr: Key Features
4-channel Class D amplifier: 4 × 150 W RMS at 2 Ω
Bridgeable: 2 × 250 W RMS at 4 Ω
LP / Full / HP electronic crossover, 30 Hz – 250 Hz
RCA low-level and high-level inputs
Gain control: 0.25 V – 6 V
Input impedance 22 kΩ, input sensitivity 250 mV – 6 V

HB154DII.desc: The HB 154D II is a 4-channel Class D amplifier delivering 4 × 150 W RMS at 4 Ω, 4 × 200 W RMS at 2 Ω, and 2 × 350 W RMS bridged at 4 Ω. It accepts both RCA low-level and high-level inputs and features an LP/Full/HP electronic crossover with adjustable frequency for precise speaker matching. Gain control spans 0.25 V to 6 V for optimal output-level adjustment.
narr: Key Features
4-channel Class D amplifier: 4 × 200 W RMS at 2 Ω
Bridgeable: 2 × 350 W RMS at 4 Ω
LP / Full / HP electronic crossover, 30 Hz – 250 Hz
RCA low-level and high-level inputs
Gain control: 0.25 V – 6 V
Input impedance 22 kΩ, input sensitivity 250 mV – 6 V

HB501DII.desc: The HB 501D II is a mono Class D amplifier delivering 1 × 300 W RMS at 4 Ω and 1 × 500 W RMS at 2 Ω, optimized for subwoofer duty. The control panel provides gain (0.25 V – 6 V), a variable LP crossover (30 – 80 Hz), a subsonic filter (20 – 50 Hz), and a variable bass boost (0 – 12 dB). A bass-level remote is included for instant dashboard adjustment.
narr: Key Features
Mono Class D amplifier: 1 × 500 W RMS at 2 Ω
Variable LP crossover: 30 – 80 Hz
Subsonic filter: 20 – 50 Hz
Variable bass boost: 0 – 12 dB
Gain control: 0.25 V – 6 V; includes bass remote
2-Ch RCA inputs, input sensitivity 250 mV – 6 V

intro: ZAPCO presents the Harmony Blue Note Series — a new full line of compact DSP/Amps and standalone amplifiers featuring PC and mobile control tools, HD Bluetooth streaming, and an integrated Music Player. The DSP/Amp lineup spans five units: the HB 68 II (8-channel DSP), the HB 46 II 4A (6-channel DSP with 4-channel Class AB amp), the HB 48 II 4A (8-channel DSP with 4-channel Class AB amp), the HB 410 II 8A (10-channel DSP with 8-channel Class AB amp), and the HB 810 II 8AD (10-channel DSP with 4-channel Class AB plus 4-channel Class D amp).

The Series also includes three dedicated amplifiers: the HB 104D II (4-channel Class D, 150 W/Ch at 2 Ω), the HB 154D II (4-channel Class D, 200 W/Ch at 2 Ω), and the HB 501D II (mono Class D, 500 W at 2 Ω). All DSP units share 31-band equalization, an I/O Mixing Matrix, adjustable crossover slopes from 6 to 48 dB/Oct., and a fully featured GUI for both PC and mobile tuning — from simple setups to advanced installs. The standalone amps feature electronic crossovers and low/high-level inputs for seamless system integration.
